# Mohamed Ali — Senior Media Buyer

> Portfolio of Mohamed Ali, a Senior Media Buyer with 7+ years of experience running performance marketing campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok and Snapchat — delivering 8x+ ROAS and 95K+ orders across 10+ countries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, expertise, global presence, and how to get in touch.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Portfolio of digital marketing case studies across e-commerce, F&B, NGO, and branding.
